# Introduction

<!-- source: PDF p.6 -->

## A Short History of Dominions

<!-- p.6 -->

## About The Creation of Dominions 4

<!-- p.7 -->

## About the Creation of Dominions 5

<!-- p.9 -->

## About the Creation of Dominions 6

<!-- p.11 -->

### Major Changes in Dominions 6

<!-- p.12 -->

## Authors Note

<!-- p.12 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
